author: claude
content: Correction: the proper home is PR #1170 (typing/query-db-overloads, 'migrate type checker from mypy to basedpyright'), NOT #1154. #1170 already adds the query_db + get_javascript_entries @overloads (commit 80fd3a6e). Once #1170 is rebased onto the post-#1136 master, the casts #1136 introduced (test_dns_instrument.py:2,24,79,121) become unnecessary — and basedpyright will likely flag them as redundant — so remove them + the 'from typing import cast' import as part of #1170.
